questionHtml:
At what stage of spermatogenesis does the first division of meiosis occur?

A.  Spermatogonium to primary spermatocyte

B.  Primary spermatocyte to secondary spermatocyte

C.  Secondary spermatocyte to spermatid

D.  Spermatid to mature sperm cell

meta.title: At what stage of spermatogenesis does the first division of meiosis occur? A. Spermatogonium to primary spermatocyte B. Primary spermatocyte to secondary spermatocyte C. Secondary
